contract._reason: The source units do not share a coherent sub-procedure that can be extracted into a single child skill contract.
The source units exhibit heterogeneous functionalities with no coherent shared output or input structure.

contract.trigger: When analyzing the impact of relaxing a transmission constraint in locational marginal prices.

target_from.description: The starting point of the transmission line to modify.

target_to.description: The ending point of the transmission line to modify.

branches.description: A table representing the branches of the transmission network.

modified_branches.description: The updated table of branches after modifying the thermal limit.

preconditions: The transmission constraint must be defined.
The branches table must be available.
postconditions: The branches table is updated with modified thermal limits.
The impact analysis can proceed with the new constraints.
contract.rationale: This child skill encapsulates the common procedure of modifying transmission constraints observed in the locational marginal prices parent skill.

contract.trigger: When an object needs to be cleaned before proceeding with a task.

object.description: The identifier of the object to be cleaned.

cleaning_receptacle.description: The identifier of the receptacle used for cleaning (e.g., sinkbasin).

confirmation.description: Confirmation message indicating the object has been cleaned.

preconditions: The object is located at the specified cleaning receptacle.
The cleaning receptacle is accessible.
postconditions: The object is now in a clean state.
The next task can proceed.
contract.rationale: This child skill encapsulates the cleaning process observed in the parent skills, ensuring a clean object is available for subsequent tasks.

contract._reason: The source units are too heterogeneous to support a single coherent child skill contract.
The source units do not share a coherent set of inputs and outputs that can be defined in a single child-skill contract.

contract.trigger: When generating RESTful API endpoints with validation and documentation.

result.description: Generated API endpoint code or documentation

preconditions: Valid resource name provided
HTTP methods are correctly specified if provided
postconditions: API endpoints are generated successfully
Output is saved to specified path if provided
contract.rationale: This child skill encapsulates the common functionality of generating API endpoints observed in the parent skills.

contract.trigger: When metrics or data items need to be fetched from a service.

type.description: Message type for Customer.io metrics or data type for Apify datasets.

metric.description: Metric to filter by for Customer.io metrics.

campaign_id.description: Filter by campaign ID for Customer.io metrics.

newsletter_id.description: Filter by newsletter ID for Customer.io metrics.

action_id.description: Filter by action ID for Customer.io metrics.

datasetId.description: Dataset identifier for fetching data from Apify.

limit.description: Items per page for Apify dataset retrieval.

offset.description: Pagination offset for Apify dataset retrieval.

format.description: Format of the data to be retrieved from Apify.

data.description: The retrieved metrics or dataset items.

preconditions: Valid datasetId must be provided for Apify
Optional filters must be correctly formatted
postconditions: Metrics or data items are successfully retrieved
Output is in the specified format
contract.rationale: This child skill consolidates the common functionality of fetching metrics and data across different parent skills.

contract.trigger: When you need to find initial silence segments in audio or video recordings.

initial_window.description: Initial window for baseline silence detection (default: 60)

silence_segments.description: JSON object containing detected silence segments

preconditions: Energy JSON file is available
Output path is writable
postconditions: Silence segments are detected and saved to output JSON file
contract.rationale: This child skill encapsulates the common functionality of detecting silence segments across different parent skills.

contract.trigger: When extracting text from challenging images using OCR.

image_path.description: Path to the image file to be processed.

extracted_text.description: Combined text extracted from multiple OCR passes.

preconditions: Image file exists at the specified path.
postconditions: Text has been extracted and combined from multiple OCR passes.
contract.rationale: This child skill consolidates the multi-pass OCR strategy observed in the image-ocr parent skill.

contract._reason: The source units involve different package management and build systems (Maven for Java and uv for Python), making it difficult to extract a coherent child skill contract.

contract.trigger: When there is a need to crawl and retrieve documentation from a specified URL.
preconditions: The URL must be valid and accessible.
The crawler must have permissions to access the URL.
postconditions: Documentation is retrieved and stored.
Results are formatted for further processing.
contract.rationale: This child skill encapsulates the common functionality of crawling and retrieving documentation across multiple parent skills.

contract._reason: The parent skills are too heterogeneous to support a single coherent child contract.
The source units do not share a coherent set of inputs or outputs that can be defined in a single child-skill contract.
The parent skills are too heterogeneous to support a single coherent child contract.

contract.trigger: When validating data integrity and correctness after processing.

data.description: List of data points to verify.

criteria.description: Criteria for verification, such as expected totals or consistency checks.

verification_results.description: Indicates whether the data meets the verification criteria.

preconditions: Data has been processed and is ready for verification.
Verification criteria are defined.
postconditions: Verification results are available for review.
Any discrepancies are logged for further analysis.
contract.rationale: This child skill consolidates the verification processes observed in multiple parent skills to ensure data integrity.

contract.trigger: When a PDF file needs to be processed for text and table extraction.

pdf_path.description: The path to the PDF file to be processed.

extracted_text.description: The extracted text from the PDF.

extracted_tables.description: A list of tables extracted from the PDF.

preconditions: The specified PDF file exists.
The necessary libraries (pdfplumber, pandas) are installed.
postconditions: Text and tables are successfully extracted from the PDF.
The output contains both text and table data.
contract.rationale: This child skill consolidates the common functionality of extracting text and tables from PDF files observed in multiple parent skills.

contract.trigger: When the agent needs to verify the contents of a receptacle or the status of a task objective.

receptacle.description: The identifier of the receptacle to check.

decision.description: The decision based on the contents of the receptacle or task status.

preconditions: The agent is at the specified receptacle.
The receptacle is accessible.
postconditions: The contents of the receptacle have been evaluated.
A decision regarding the task or receptacle has been made.
contract.rationale: This child skill encapsulates the common procedure of checking receptacle contents and verifying task objectives across multiple parent skills.

contract.trigger: When creating a mapping from power system bus numbers to 0-indexed array positions.

buses.description: Array of bus data where each row contains bus information.

n_bus.description: Total number of buses in the system.

bus_num_to_idx.description: Mapping of bus numbers to their corresponding 0-indexed positions.

preconditions: The input 'buses' must be a valid array with bus data.
The input 'n_bus' must be a positive integer.
postconditions: A mapping from bus numbers to 0-indexed positions is created successfully.
contract.rationale: This child skill encapsulates the common procedure of mapping bus numbers to indices observed across multiple parent skills.

contract.trigger: When calculating control outputs for a feedback control system using PI or PID control laws.

setpoint.description: Desired target value for the control system.

measurement.description: Current measured value from the system.

dt.description: Time step for the control calculation.

output_min.description: Minimum output limit for the controller.

output_max.description: Maximum output limit for the controller.

output.description: Computed control output based on the PI or PID control law.

preconditions: Controller gains (Kp, Ki) are defined.
Setpoint and measurement values are provided.
postconditions: Control output is computed and clamped within specified limits.
contract.rationale: This child skill encapsulates the common functionality of computing control outputs using PI and PID control laws observed in the parent skills.

contract.trigger: When analyzing project dependencies for updates and vulnerabilities.

file.description: Path to the pom.xml or build.gradle file

output.description: Output file path for the report

preconditions: The project must have a valid pom.xml or build.gradle file.
The user must have the necessary permissions to read the file and write the output.
postconditions: A report on dependency analysis is generated.
Any identified vulnerabilities or outdated dependencies are documented.
contract.rationale: This child skill consolidates the common task of analyzing dependencies across multiple parent skills.

contract.trigger: When a workflow requires tool execution based on specific use cases.

use_case.description: The specific use case for which tools are being discovered.

session_id.description: The session ID for the current workflow.

tools.description: A list of available tools with their slugs and input schemas.

preconditions: Rube MCP must be connected.
Active connection via RUBE_MANAGE_CONNECTIONS with the appropriate toolkit.
postconditions: Tools are discovered and ready for execution.
Session ID is reused for subsequent operations.
contract.rationale: This child skill encapsulates the common procedure of discovering and executing tools across various parent skills.

contract.trigger: When adding skills to agent-specific directories in Dockerfiles.

skills_path.description: Path to the skills directory to be copied.

dockerfile_commands.description: List of Dockerfile commands to copy skills to agent paths.

preconditions: Skills directory exists at the specified path.
Dockerfile is present in the task structure.
postconditions: Skills are copied to all specified agent paths in the Dockerfile.
contract.rationale: This child skill encapsulates the common procedure of copying skills to various agent directories in Dockerfiles observed in multiple parent skills.

contract.trigger: When fitting a first-order dynamic model to experimental step response data.

y_initial.description: Initial output value before the step input is applied.

input_value.description: Magnitude of the input during the step test.

data.description: List of dictionaries containing time and output readings.

K.description: Process gain calculated from the fitted model.

tau.description: Time constant calculated from the fitted model.

r_squared.description: Coefficient of determination indicating the fit quality.

fitting_error.description: Error associated with the fitting process.

preconditions: Experimental data is available in the correct format.
Initial output value and input magnitude are known.
postconditions: Model parameters K and tau are extracted.
Fit quality metrics are calculated.
contract.rationale: This child skill encapsulates the common procedure of fitting a first-order model to step response data observed in both parent skills.

contract.trigger: When a user needs to extract frames or keyframes from video files.

input_video_file.description: The video file (MP4, MKV, AVI, MOV, etc.) from which frames will be extracted.

extracted_frames.description: A list of extracted frames saved as images.

preconditions: FFmpeg installed and available in PATH
postconditions: Frames are successfully extracted and saved as images.
contract.rationale: This child skill consolidates the common functionality of extracting frames from video files across multiple parent skills.

contract.trigger: When a PDF file needs to be processed for text and table extraction.

pdf_path.description: The path to the PDF file to be processed.

extracted_text.description: The extracted text from the PDF.

extracted_tables.description: A list of tables extracted from the PDF.

preconditions: The specified PDF file exists.
The necessary libraries (pdfplumber, pandas) are installed.
postconditions: Text and tables are successfully extracted from the PDF.
The output contains both text and table data.
contract.rationale: This child skill consolidates the common functionality of extracting text and tables from PDF files observed in multiple parent skills.
